text: As I stand here, my mind stirs with curiosity and anticipation. The glass doors evoke a sense of threshold, a boundary between the ordinary and the space of ideas beyond. The R+D wall vibrates with purpose; I am drawn to the promise of innovation and human co-existence with technology. In this place, I feel both grounded and uplifted, poised on the edge of understanding, eager for what I might discover just past this threshold.
